message:
🌱 Add harbor: Can not delete user login with oidc mission (#1004)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "harbor-8424-can-not-delete-user-login-with-oidc",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "harbor: Can not delete user login with oidc",
+    "description": "Can not delete user login with oidc. Requested by 31+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current harbor deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your harbor version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n harbor -l app.kubernetes.io/name=harbor\nhelm list -n harbor 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working harbor installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review harbor OIDC configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant harbor configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n harbor -l app.kubernetes.io/name=harbor\nkubectl get configmap -n harbor -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=harbor\n```\nWhen using an OIDC provider like Dex or Keycloak, deleted users in the provider cannot be removed through the Harbor dashboard."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Delete the OIDC user from Harbor's database",
+        "description": "Connect to the Harbor database pod and remove the user records directly:\n```bash\n# Get the database pod name\nPOD_NAME=$(kubectl get pods -n harbor --output=json | jq -r '.items[].metadata | select(.name | startswith(\"harbor-database\")) | .name')\n\n# Open a shell in the database pod\nkubectl exec -it -n harbor $POD_NAME -- bash\n\n# Connect to the PostgreSQL CLI\npsql -U postgres\n```\nThen run the following SQL to remove the user:\n```sql\n\\c registry\n\n-- Find the user_id for the user to delete\nSELECT user_id FROM harbor_user WHERE username = 'target_username';\n\n-- Replace <USER_ID> with the actual user_id from the query above\nDELETE FROM project_member WHERE entity_id = <USER_ID> AND entity_type = 'u';\nDELETE FROM oidc_user WHERE user_id = <USER_ID>;\nDELETE FROM harbor_user WHERE user_id = <USER_ID>;\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n harbor -l app.kubernetes.io/name=harbor\nkubectl get events -n harbor --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Can not delete user login with oidc\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "When OIDC authentication is enabled in Harbor and a user is removed from the OIDC provider (e.g., Dex or Keycloak), the user cannot log in via the UI but Docker CLI access may persist. Harbor does not expose a UI option to delete OIDC-authenticated users. The workaround is to directly delete the user records from Harbor's PostgreSQL database by removing rows from the oidc_user, project_member, and harbor_user tables for the target user_id.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "# Get the database pod name\nPOD_NAME=$(kubectl get pods -n harbor --output=json | jq -r '.items[].metadata | select(.name | startswith(\"harbor-database\")) | .name')\n\n# Open a shell in the database pod\nkubectl exec -it -n harbor $POD_NAME -- bash\n\n# Connect to the PostgreSQL CLI\npsql -U postgres",
+        "\\c registry\n\n-- Find the user_id for the user to delete\nSELECT user_id FROM harbor_user WHERE username = 'target_username';\n\n-- Replace <USER_ID> with the actual user_id\nDELETE FROM project_member WHERE entity_id = <USER_ID> AND entity_type = 'u';\nDELETE FROM oidc_user WHERE user_id = <USER_ID>;\nDELETE FROM harbor_user WHERE user_id = <USER_ID>;"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "harbor",
+      "graduated",
+      "security",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "harbor"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Pod",
+      "Service"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "advanced",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/goharbor/harbor/issues/8424",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/goharbor/harbor"
+    },
+    "reactions": 31,
+    "comments": 54,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl",
+      "helm"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with harbor installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-12T06:19:45.945Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
